$schema_note: Anthropic Claude Desktop .dxt extension manifest. Schema is still in flux at the time of authoring (Q1 build); we lock dxt_version to '0.1' as the conservative baseline. If/when Anthropic ships a stable schema reference and the field names diverge, this file should be regenerated to match — keep server.type=http, the user_config prompt fields, and the tools list as the source of truth.
name: gluecron
description: AI-native git hosting. Claude can open PRs, review code, merge, manage issues, drive autopilot — all on Gluecron.
long_description: Gluecron is the git host built around Claude. This extension exposes the full 50+ tool MCP surface: read/write files, open/review/merge PRs, file/label/assign issues, ship specs, run multi-repo refactors, chat with a repo, generate tests, propose migrations, dispatch + cancel workflows, lease agent multiplayer targets, and query semantic + symbol indices. Drive the entire AI-native dev loop end-to-end.

gluecron_pat.title: Personal access token
gluecron_pat.description: Generate one at <host>/settings/tokens with admin scope (needed for write tools).

tools.name: gluecron_repo_search
tools.description: Search public Gluecron repositories by keyword.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_read_file
tools.description: Read a file from a Gluecron repo at a ref.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_list_issues
tools.description: List open issues for a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_explain_codebase
tools.description: Get the AI explain-this-codebase Markdown for a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_health
tools.description: Compute the current health score for a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_create_issue
tools.description: Open a new issue.

tools.name: gluecron_comment_issue
tools.description: Comment on an issue.

tools.name: gluecron_close_issue
tools.description: Close an issue.

tools.name: gluecron_reopen_issue
tools.description: Reopen an issue.

tools.name: gluecron_create_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request from head into base.

tools.name: gluecron_get_pr
tools.description: Read a PR's metadata + state + mergeable hint.

tools.name: gluecron_list_prs
tools.description: List PRs by state.

tools.name: gluecron_comment_pr
tools.description: Comment on a PR.

tools.name: gluecron_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a PR (gated on branch protection + AI review + risk score).

tools.name: gluecron_close_pr
tools.description: Close a PR without merging.

tools.name: gluecron_fork_repo
tools.description: Fork a repo to the caller's namespace.

tools.name: gluecron_delete_repo
tools.description: Permanently delete a repo (admin).

tools.name: gluecron_update_repo
tools.description: Update description / visibility / default branch.

tools.name: gluecron_search_repos
tools.description: Full search of public repos with sort + filters.

tools.name: gluecron_clone_url
tools.description: Authed HTTPS clone URL + credential-helper hint.

tools.name: gluecron_label_issue
tools.description: Attach labels to an issue (auto-creates missing).

tools.name: gluecron_unlabel_issue
tools.description: Detach a single label from an issue.

tools.name: gluecron_assign_issue
tools.description: Assign an issue to a user via assignee:* label.

tools.name: gluecron_search_issues
tools.description: Title/body keyword search of issues on a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_request_changes
tools.description: Post a 'changes requested' AI-review comment on a PR.

tools.name: gluecron_search_prs
tools.description: Title/body keyword search of PRs on a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_open_draft_pr
tools.description: Open a draft pull request (is_draft=true).

tools.name: gluecron_generate_pr_description
tools.description: AI commit-message-style description for a diff.

tools.name: gluecron_read_file
tools.description: Read a file at a ref (REST /contents wrapper).

tools.name: gluecron_write_file
tools.description: Create/update a file on a branch (utf8 or base64).

tools.name: gluecron_delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file on a branch (optimistic-concurrency by sha).

tools.name: gluecron_list_tree
tools.description: List a directory tree at a ref (recursive supported).

tools.name: gluecron_get_commit
tools.description: Fetch a single commit's metadata.

tools.name: gluecron_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch ref at an existing sha.

tools.name: gluecron_atomic_multi_file_commit
tools.description: Apply a set of writes + deletes as one atomic commit.

tools.name: gluecron_ship_spec
tools.description: Drop .gluecron/specs/*.md status:ready for the autopilot.

tools.name: gluecron_voice_to_pr
tools.description: Transcript → spec or issue (auto-classified).

tools.name: gluecron_refactor_across_repos
tools.description: Plan + execute a multi-repo refactor.

tools.name: gluecron_explain_repo
tools.description: Cached AI explain-this-repo markdown.

tools.name: gluecron_chat_with_repo
tools.description: Start a chat with a repo + send the first message.

tools.name: gluecron_chat_continue
tools.description: Send another message in an existing repo chat.

tools.name: gluecron_generate_tests
tools.description: Generate tests for a PR (follow-up-pr or append-commit).

tools.name: gluecron_generate_commit_message
tools.description: Generate a commit message for a diff.

tools.name: gluecron_generate_release_notes
tools.description: Section-bucketed release notes between two tags.

tools.name: gluecron_propose_migration
tools.description: Propose a dep-upgrade PR via migration-assistant.

tools.name: gluecron_propose_doc_update
tools.description: Doc-drift scan + AI-rewrite PR.

tools.name: gluecron_trigger_workflow
tools.description: Dispatch a workflow_dispatch run.

tools.name: gluecron_get_workflow_run
tools.description: Fetch a workflow run's metadata + status.

tools.name: gluecron_get_workflow_logs
tools.description: Per-job log payload for a workflow run.

tools.name: gluecron_cancel_workflow_run
tools.description: Cancel a queued/running workflow run.

tools.name: gluecron_get_preview_url
tools.description: Branch-preview URL + status for (repo, branch).

tools.name: gluecron_provision_pr_sandbox
tools.description: Provision (or re-provision) a sandbox for a PR.

tools.name: gluecron_create_agent_session
tools.description: Mint an agent-multiplayer session (token returned once).

tools.name: gluecron_acquire_lease
tools.description: Grab an exclusive lease on a target for an agent.

tools.name: gluecron_release_lease
tools.description: Release a held lease by id.

tools.name: gluecron_get_agent_budget
tools.description: Return spent / cap / remaining cents for an agent.

tools.name: gluecron_semantic_search
tools.description: Query the per-repo vector index.

tools.name: gluecron_find_symbol
tools.description: Find definitions of a symbol within a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_pr_status_summary
tools.description: Compute a one-shot status summary for a PR.

tools.name: gluecron_ai_cost_summary
tools.description: Return AI spend rollups (user/repo/agent).
